_publications._publicationTitle: Pilot study of the effectiveness of a telehealth group for improving peer relationships for adolescents with neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: The Self-Management subscale on the SSIS-SEL Student Form was significantly better at post-test with a medium effect size
resourceName: Social Skills Improvement System Social-Emotional Learning (SSIS-SEL)
details: SSIS-SEL Student Form Self-Management subscale showed significant improvement at post-test with medium effect size (g = -0.42)
